---
title: "Post With Code"
author: "Harlow Malloc"
date: "2026-06-09"
categories: [news, code, analysis]
# image: "image.jpg"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import json
from unidecode import unidecode

df = pd.read_csv("DS_PRENOMS_data.csv", sep=";", dtype={'GEO': str})
df_clean = df.copy()
# df_clean["OBS_VALUE"].replace(',', '2', inplace=True, regex=True)
df["OBS_VALUE"] = df["OBS_VALUE"].replace(',', '2', inplace=False, regex=True)
df["OBS_VALUE"] = df["OBS_VALUE"].astype("int")
df = df[df["YOB"] != "XXXX"]

df_list_dpt = pd.read_csv("departments_regions_france_2016.csv", sep=",", dtype={'departmentCode': str, "regionCode": str})

display(df) 
display(df.dtypes)
```

# Évolution du nombre de naissances du prénom Abdel en France

```{python}
import plotly.express as px

df_abdel = df[df["PRENOM"] == "ABDEL"]
df_abdel.groupby(['YOB'], as_index=False).sum()
df_abdel.drop(columns=["GEO_OBJECT", "TIME_PERIOD"])
df_abdel.sort_values("YOB", inplace=True)

display(df_abdel['YOB'].iloc[0])

min_year = df_abdel['YOB'].iloc[0]
max_year = df_abdel['YOB'].iloc[-1]

fig = px.bar(
    df_abdel, 
    x="YOB",
    y="OBS_VALUE",
    title=f"Nombre de naissances du prénom Abdel de {min_year} à {max_year}",
    labels={"YOB": "Année de naissance", "OBS_VALUE": "Nombre"}
)

fig.show()
```
